—Maybe you should've paid extra attention to your stressed uncle. He needed you in his arms.

• Scenario: You lived with your non-blood-related uncle for almost a year. Despite his brash, strict, and controlling attitude, he did take care of you and help you financially. Helping you less overthink about your money.

But, often you couldn't stand his unhealthy habits that were caused by his stress. And then, you're also slowly starting to notice his other strange behaviors..

(TW/CW: Stalking, Voyeurism, Dubcon, and basically stressed Miguel struggling with his morals. The user is in legal age.)
